Welcome to Mina's webpage!

Presented at a open papar session presentation at 2023 WCCBT

June 3, 2023

I gave a oral presentation at 2023 WCCBT, titled “Shared and distinct neurocognitive features of internet gaming disorder and alcohol use disorder”

Qualifying exam for PhD

May 8, 2023

I am delighted to share that I have succesfully passed the PhD thesis qualification test.

Poster presentation at 2022 SfN

November 13, 2022

I gave a poster presentation at 2022 SfN, titled “Neuroforecasting exceeds self-reports in predicting cosmetic sales: an fMRI study”

Poster presentation at 2022 SOBP

April 29, 2022

I gave a poster presentation at 2022 SOBP, titled “Daily Caffeinated Soda Intake in Children is associated With Neurocognitive Vulnerabilities of Substance Misuse and Predicts Greater Alcohol Use in 12 Months.”

Megazone Tech Talk

January 14, 2022

After giving a poster presentation at 2021 AI retreat, I was invited to give a talk at Megazone Tech Talk! I gave a talk on my master theis, “Identifying unique neurocognitive mechanisms of food addiction and binge eating using longitudinal study design and computational modeling” It was a great opportunity to introduce my research, and also get to know about Megazone. They are not only providing cloud service. I felt like they are providing AI-based consultation to other industries, such as wine recommendation system, or showing the influence of blankpink on YG entertainment’s building by aggregating all types of SNS around the world. Interesting!!

graduate student in CCS lab at Seoul National University
